notes.heading: Update now stops first
notes.body: The Update Server action now stops Dragonwilds before SteamCMD updates the server files, so locked files are much less likely to block the update.

notes.heading: Restarts only when expected
notes.body: If the server was running before the update, the app starts it again when SteamCMD finishes. If it was offline, it stays offline.

notes.heading: Graceful shutdown path
notes.body: The app now tries to quit the managed server cleanly before falling back to Windows process shutdown, with force shutdown reserved for timeout cases.

notes.heading: Clearer update status
notes.body: The dashboard now labels updates as a workflow so it is clearer that stop, SteamCMD update, and optional restart can happen as separate steps.
